title: AWX Activity Stream Privileged Object Changes
app: AWX external logging integration (see ansible/awx logging_integration.md)
spl:
index=automation sourcetype="awx:activity_stream" logger_name="awx.analytics.activity_stream"
| search object1="*credential*" OR object1="*execution_environment*" OR operation="create" OR operation="delete"
| stats count by actor, operation, object1
| sort -count
description: Credential and EE changes must be traceable for break-glass and supply-chain audits.
value: Captures who changed automation credentials and execution environments.
implementation: Route to restricted index; retain per policy. Join actors to IdP username format.

references.title: AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)
